_comment: Real Dossier IDs only. 'menu-display' and 'booking-cta' are required because a restaurant without a menu or booking path is not a restaurant site. 'opening-hours', 'map-embed' and 'mailto-contact-form' are recommended because every brick-and-mortar restaurant has hours, a location, and needs a contact path. 'image-gallery' and 'reviews-display' are recommended because food atmosphere and social proof are the two highest-conversion signals for restaurant sites. Sections like 'hero', 'menu-preview', 'hours-location' are declared in sections.json and must not appear here. See ADR 0012 for the Dossier vs Section distinction.

conditional.when: the venue explicitly wants a playable game element (kids' area, retro arcade theme)
